result.text: Scan: STUDENT DRIVER placard detected. Heart rate readings: instructor {n:80-110} bpm, student {n:100-140} bpm. They are about to attempt a merge. All ships: reduce judgment. Assist telepathically, or give space?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

assist.text: Broadcasting calm on all frequencies... the merge approaches... Captain, they're signaling correctly. This is textbook. Do we log this as a perfect merge for their permanent record?

logged.text: MERGE COMPLETE. Flawless. Logged with honors in the Registry of First Merges. Somewhere, an instructor exhaled. A driver was born today, Captain.

watched.text: The merge succeeded on its own merits. We were merely witnesses to history. May all their lane changes be so clean.

space.text: Space granted — the greatest gift a road can give. The student merged safely into legend, or at least into the middle lane.
